title: ENTOEND Crawling Insect Glue Traps | Pack of 30 | Sticky Indoor Spider Catcher | Easy to Use Adhesive Paper Trap to Catch Spiders, Bedbugs, Carpet Beetles, Silverfish, Cockroaches and Other Insects
bullet_points: INSECT & SPIDER TRAP - Multipurpose sticky trap ideal for indoor use in the house. Specifically designed for home use in kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, basements and more. Place under beds and furniture, under baseboards and around wall-floor joins. Lightweight designs also means the traps can be easily placed on shelves and above cupboards in order to catch spiders.

HIGHLY EFFECTIVE – We’re proud to boast years of knowledge and experience in the pest control industry, and this extends to our spider traps which are expertly made to guarantee quality, durability throughout the year and the highest of catch rates with extra strong adhesive.

MULTIPURPOSE CATCHER - Our traps are designed to blend into the home and catch unsuspecting bugs. The traps do not contain species-specific attractants, but work very very well against a wide variety of crawling pests. Use for bedbug, silverfish, cockroach, carpet beetle, moth, ant infestations and as a spider catcher.

INSECTICIDE FREE SPIDER KILLER - Our spider traps are insecticide and repellent free, ensuring they are suitable for use around throughout the home, including in the kitchen around food preparation areas. The traps are suitable for use in houses with children and pets when used as directed - place each insect trap under furniture and out of reach areas.

EASY TO USE - Our traps are designed to be effective and easy to use. To set up simply remove a sheet from the packaging, tear an individual trap from the sheet using the perforated edge, and fold into shape. hen ready place in desired location. For best results to kill spiders and moths, place above cupboards and wardrobes or in the top corners of rooms. For ants place near entry areas and sources of food. For other bed bugs, carpet beetles and fleas place under furniture and beds or near pet bedding.
